title: kalimeris angustifolia
intro: Kalimeris angustifolia, also known as the Chinese Aster or Narrow-leaved Kalimeris, is a perennial herb native to East Asia that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Its roots and leaves are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kalimeris angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving headaches and rheumatism, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Kalimeris angustifolia is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
